text.title: Tech-Debt Budget for Solos Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: 2-week cycle 20% cap
example.note: Cycle 14d; cap 20% (=2.8d); 3 items scored; td-001 (impact 4, interest 3) pay (1.5d); td-003 (impact 5, interest 4) pay (1d); td-002 (impact 2, interest 1) monitor. Total paid 2.5d, under cap. Signed RM 2026-05-15T10:00:00Z.

example.title: all-debt cycle
example.note: 60% allocated to refactor across 2 cycles; product roadmap slips; debt items still unscored; ledger last signed 4 months ago. Decision tree caught: over-cap then unscored-items then stale-ledger.
